spark_thief.name: Spark Thief
spark_thief.description: A quick-fingered rogue who channels lightning through stolen gemstones. Found lurking on trade roads.
spark_thief.recruit_dialogue: Heh... you're tougher than you look. Fine, I'll tag along. Could use the coin.

wind_scout.name: Wind Scout
wind_scout.description: A wandering archer who rides the wind. Light on their feet and deadly at range.
wind_scout.recruit_dialogue: Not bad! I've been looking for a worthy leader. Count me in.

stone_sentinel.name: Stone Sentinel
stone_sentinel.description: A stoic guardian in heavy stone armor. Painfully slow but nearly impossible to bring down.
stone_sentinel.recruit_dialogue: ...You have strength. I will guard you, as I once guarded these ruins.

goblin.name: Goblin
goblin.description: A scrappy, foul-tempered creature that attacks travelers on sight. Too wild and treacherous to ever be trusted.

hex_weaver.name: Hex Weaver
hex_weaver.description: A timid apprentice witch found in the woods. Weaves minor curses and charms from spider silk.
hex_weaver.recruit_dialogue: P-please don't hurt me anymore! I'll help you, I promise! I know useful spells!
